hb9b5e290g4108g4d58gbbe4g0cb5cf05a8df: Someone's got it out for us. Find the bastard!
h7b2b907ag455dg4cdega146g30c9bb3e0dfd: Here - help us out. Sez here that 'goblinoids are obstreperous and malodorous'. What's that mean?
hdb3605b0g6d45g469bga8fbg8ab42ab62623: Smelliest thing around here is you, mate. That dung on yer mug's makin' my eyes water.
hd3c73dbeg3c97g4dc7gab76gb58f24cba66f: Hard enough readin' this without you stinkin' up the place.
h0666181cgeca0g4ad5g8463g49a55922ffb0: Belonged to some bloke that showed up here askin' questions. Bold as a bugbear, he woz!
h874763acged7bg4d1cga1beg134042d4e1dc: Said he's writin' a book about the Absolute. Lads didn't like that - said he was a spy or some such...
h1546c868g0cc8g4387g9c16ge198137270b4: ... think they've locked 'im in the cells already.
h2ffc5b95gbd52g49e2g854egd45b72c9fb74: ... that's 'im, at the party, warblin' away.
h696bd9fag8d63g4aeag9429ge3935cd688fc: I had a good chinwag with him though. Interestin' bloke.
hc5d23bf4gb9d9g4cf4g8ab2g8306eb4dda0a: That 'bloke' was Volothamp Geddarm, famed chronicler of the Realms.
hbfb938b2g7d79g41eag85abg251dcc2f3be1: Yeah, he mentioned that. About a thousand times.
h878e1aa4g88deg48ddgbf24g1798195aac4f: Don't matter how famed he is; he's gonna end up as supper.
hbd608850g2ec4g4505ga555g5939d235554c: What was so interesting about him?
hd0fbe08eg1fbeg4065ga758g69822d563640: He wanted to know if we felt any extra booyahg in the air since convertin'.
h99f6a679g7252g40cagb6e0g0368b067942b: Magic. Them wot the Absolute chooses are brimmin' with it.
h03bfe8d5gc0f0g4f63g9c8bg6a372282919e: Priestess Gut and our boss Ragzlin, are fearsome powerful now. Same as that drow.
hd6c23cd3g6494g48ddg8bd2g1a05917e3712: Seems we've pegged all three marks. Let the boss hunt begin.
h5321155bge4eeg4962g95b6gbec4beb44be7: Priestess Gut and our boss Ragzlin, are fearsome powerful now. Same as that drow.
h7f569752gad9fg4933g97fcgf7d0069ee039: And? Has your tribe's power increased?
h8e1daf3cge34dg464ag8e31g0d4dff98d27f: Yeah - priestess Gut is fearsome powerful now. So's Ragzlin, our boss. Them's True Souls now. Just like that drow.
h55410aeeg7eb2g4130g8d85g343b05121d0a: They have the kinda booyahg that comes from bein' chosen by a god.
h087ba3b3g8175g4469ga388g38fb51469e1d: They have the kinda booyahg that comes from bein' chosen by a god.
hb07251f9g31bcg4c8ag98e8g5b75330477ee: Have you met any other interesting people? A druid, perhaps?
h08ba9c8cg0df4g4bebga571gc1dc7cbd6b8b: There were some troublemakers, but they're either dead or wishing they were. Don't know if there was a druid though.
hf4ffb58dg522ag43dega193gae8c93e8f354: He's probably down in the pens, fattenin' up the worgs like all the rest.
hf21e47bag6f43g43adg9639ga4e77cfa2677: This writer - will he be fed to the worgs too?
h1a272ebfg6fccg454dgb77cg96098613fda3: Nah. We're keepin' him as our own little plaything, so long as he don't ask any more awkward questions
h748f0833gbdb4g4d0bg9d5agc693d5f849d8: I ain't finished with it! There's enough readin' here to last me a lifetime.
h374e8f88ge206g4ecbg8c5eg4437d585b19f: *The mark glows, but you feel nothing in response. Your illithid power is beyond reach until you rest.*
hac4cd093g6f6dg4aa8g8cf9ge7ef1b822162: You're an authority on the Absolute - you should be the one writing about it.
hb9ccc490g8696g4827g9688ge614c7af4498: You're right! What does some bleedin' outsider know that I don't? I'll be famous!
h2840bc1fgea6bg4249gb13bga44b3bfaaadf: And nobody will remember this pack of lies.
h2a513f07g2e2bg4473ga1cegfc1ddf963755: Your lifetime gets shorter every second you keep that book.
h2ea2324cg10c2g44d2ga740g2079f743f5fc: Bloody hell - an' people say goblins are savage.
hbbce01e9g3944g4751gb6e8g52e35a572a7e: It ain't worth fightin' over. Take it!
h227cd646gab6fg4d1bgb77age2734b645040: Wanna fight? Take your best shot.
he0386994g0fb8g427fgba35gc43bbb8be9e6: Half the camp'll tear into ya before you have a chance to regret it.
h7e332537g4869g4a57ga83ag8fb195ac8658: It'll be a very short lifetime if you don't hand me the manuscript.
h1e875ae4gacecg4251gb401g53ffa74db38f: You should spend your time in prayer - not reading this nonsense.
hf60a26a9gf43bg4c9aga523g2af0158526ba: S'pose you're right. Absolute rewards faith, not book-learnin'.
ha20ec19bg9d79g4651gbe74gfb2fff87e263: Take it. Maybe if I pray hard enough I can get some of that booyahg for myself.
h68fa6191g67abg4d95g965egfcb9b5567be4: I pray plenty. Day and night. Don't mean I can't educate myself as well.
h7f0e5d67g3524g4ee5g86b2gbcc4c8e42c7e: And that's what I'm gonna do. So buzz off.
h8287a6f8g0eefg4f0dga0aegdcf079947f64: You should spend your time in prayer - not reading this nonsense.
h01c63709g545eg46a2ga069g5e3458ee5c7a: This stuff ain't bad... but somebody who really knows the Absolute should be writin' Her story.
h5dd562edgdf5eg420bgb292g04a0cf4646a0: *A strange symbol glows, marked on their flesh, and something within you stirs in response.*
he00038f5gbe3dg48afgb507gd44259f53105: You will give me the book.
h86ae646fgc9fdg4a96gba3fg744798857f00: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
h5040df22g4711g414dg9380gb55f9f831bdc: You made me do that... didn't have no choice, did I?
h5b770e9cg5167g4922gb78ag2df76aae8f50: That's some impressive booyahg. Absolute must like ya.
h58048c39g0aebg4032g9b18gc343441ee20f: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
hde69dbd2gaa8eg4548gbe32g581fa1571f12: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
hbba8b4a2ge3dbg4119ga3a3g24261c89fafc: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
hba0e79f7g4b95g4df4g924agf74d32f5ba4a: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
h40512154g57ebg4442ga8b2g32a9ea35018a: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
h1930e08bga046g4744g94cbg6387509488f1: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
hb4ddafc8ge318g42fcg92c1gb36b00bdaeb3: You will give me the book.
h4864c8b9g09a6g4e6dga93cg0ea7704cc188: Are you trying to scare me? Cuz it ain't working. Clear off.
h56ffa91fge31bg4ed1gb122g3c68ddaf23f7: *As the symbol glows, power courses through you. Authority.*
h019ac136g4bdfg4e18g8e3cg7ac504b1f715: And Volo - will he be fed to the worgs too?
h097ee386g3bbeg4c67g8adfg539f1747bd4f: Most goblins I've met aren't terribly interested in reading.
h53798660g26a4g46eeg8ad0g0f49d9ac93bb: That's wot the bloke who wrote this said! Proper impressed by my brain-smarts, he woz.
h64f6dc21g8a2bg42e5g9669g8e1675349b20: Ain't that the truth! Proper stink around here now we've settled in.
h1a1f7a87ga63fg428ag85cega4e468497d94: An' all that ruckus makes it hard to concentrate on reading.
h2c33cf5egda1eg4223gaf03g5cf57d186383: That's quite the compliment. It means you're extremely intelligent.
haa26deecgcca9g420fgad5fge6c232136b9a: Bit confusin', cuz it sez we're 'feeble-minded weaklings' right before that.
h75d8edc3g0662g4cc7g8c55ga2f16b689bec: Still - only other stuff to read around 'ere is the filth Klagga scrawls in the latrines.
he5dbcc6bg152eg4805g937bgb76bf0723cd2: Huh? What do you want? I'm tryin' to concentrate on readin'!
hfe22c9eeg8e46g4dd8ga0f6g184cd5e04f1b: You should go get a drink before the party dies down.
hdfc1b953gc141g4951g82a8g907f5becd916: Wish I had my book back - think it was one of your mates who took it.
